parameters.content:
## Generate DOCX Contract

Legal teams and SaaS companies use this recipe to generate a service agreement programmatically. Define the contracting parties, scope of work, payment terms, and legal clauses — delivered as an editable DOCX file ready for review and signature.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Generate Document
Resource: **Document Generation**

Configure the Document Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.
